title: Unknown event_type vs CHECK constraint
description: Attempt to insert an agent_event with an event_type not in the CHECK constraint list. The insert must fail gracefully with a database error, and the runner must log the error without crashing.
production_scenario: A code change introduces a new event_type string but the database migration hasn't been applied yet. The CHECK constraint rejects the insert, and the runner must handle this gracefully — log the error and continue, not crash the entire execution.
